data.title: Kanye West: Official Meme Coin will be launched next week, and the tokens on the market are fake projects
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Well-known rapper Kanye West posted on the X platform that all related Meme coins currently on the market are fake, and he will launch his own official Meme coin next week.

data.title: Santiment: Affected by factors such as the Bybit theft and the issuance of LIBRA, the market is in extreme fear
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Santiment posted on the X platform that due to the shock caused by the Bybit hack in the encryption field, coupled with the worrying news about LIBRA and other contributing factors this week, the crowd showed extreme fear as Bitcoin plummeted. According to the sentiment score, the negative sentiment in the encryption community is the same as before the price rebound on February 17 and 18. While nothing is certain, and a major exchange hack may have a lasting impact on the crowd's perception, remember that the market almost always moves in the opposite direction of what retail traders expect.

data.title: A whale or institution transferred 11,800 ETH from Binance to Bybit 6 hours ago, worth $31 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to LookonChain monitoring, 6 hours ago, a whale or institution transferred 11,800 ETH (worth 31 million US dollars) from Binance to Bybit's cold wallet as support for Bybit customer withdrawals.

data.title: Nillion: Mainnet launch postponed to March
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Privacy and security computing network Nillion officially announced on the X platform that the release of Nillion mainnet has been postponed to March.

data.title: Zora launches post tokenization feature, with a single token supply of 1 billion, and creators automatically receive 10 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Zora officially announced on the X platform that it has launched the post tokenization function on the Zora platform. Each post can correspond to one token, with a supply of 1 billion. Creators automatically receive 10 million tokens when they publish, and creators can earn 1% from each transaction. The tokens are for entertainment only and have been launched on the website and beta mobile APP.

data.title: The hacker Lazarus behind the Bybit theft processed the stolen funds through ETH-BTC-fiat currency, and the process of selling the stolen funds may last for many years
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The Bybit theft incident has been basically considered to be the work of the North Korean hacker group Lazarus Group. Chainalysis has previously released a report on the "disposal" of the stolen money by the Lazarus Group. Generally speaking, the Lazarus Group will take three steps to "dispose" of the stolen money: the first step is to convert all ERC20 (including liquidity derivative tokens such as stETH) into ETH; the second step is to convert ETH into BTC; the third step is to gradually convert BTC into legal currency through Asian exchanges. The whole process may last for many years.

data.title: Bybit Ecosystem Project mETH Protocol: To support Bybit investigation, cmETH withdrawals have been suspended, and the protocol itself is safe
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: mETH Protocol, a liquidity pledge/re-pledge protocol under Mantle, which has a deep binding relationship with Bybit, said that it has learned that Bybit has recently had a security incident involving certain mETH and cmETH transactions, including a withdrawal request of 15,000 cmETH. In order to support the ongoing investigation, cmETH withdrawals on the platform have been suspended, and deposit and pledge services are proceeding as usual.
User funds on mETH Protocol remain safe and unaffected, and the protocol is still protected by the highest security standards. Once withdrawals are resumed, the community will be notified immediately.

data.title: Yesterday, Grayscale GBTC had a net outflow of US$60.1 million, and BITB had a net outflow of US$16.6 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Farside Investors monitoring, Grayscale GBTC had a net outflow of US$60.1 million yesterday, Bitwise BITB had a net outflow of US$16.6 million, Fidelity FBTC had a net outflow of US$12.5 million, and VanEck HODL had a net inflow of US$4.7 million.

data.title: Bybit CEO: $2.95 billion in assets will be transferred, and an advance statement will be made to show that there has been no further attack
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Bybit co-founder and CEO Ben Zhou said in the latest post on the X platform: "We will transfer USD 2.95 billion worth of USDT from cold wallets to hot wallets. This is a planned operation for reference only. We were not hacked this time."

data.title: Safe Addresses Security Concerns Following Bybit Wallet Incident
data.description: According to Foresight News, the multi-signature wallet protocol Safe has confirmed that all transaction information for Bybit wallets is accurately displayed on the front end, including the execution of malicious transactions with all signatures. Safe reported no leaks in its codebase or malicious dependencies, and no other Safe addresses have been affected. Following the incident, Safe has temporarily suspended its Wallet functionality to thoroughly inspect service configurations and replace infrastructure credentials. The company is also collaborating with external security researchers to audit its codebase.
